results.rendered_html:
viśuddha a.
1 Purified, cleansed.
2 Pure, free from vice, sin, or
(pb) imperfection.
3 Spotless, stainless.
4 Correct, accurate.
5 Virtuous, pious, straightforward; viśuddhamugdhaḥ kulakanyakājanaḥ  Māl. 7. 1. 
6 Humble
— ddhaṃ A kind of mystical circle (cakra) in the body.
